title: SpaceX 已向 SEC 递交保密 IPO 申请，承销商名单曝光
summary: 知情人士透露，SpaceX 于 4 月 1 日正式提交保密 IPO 申请，高盛与摩根士丹利担任联席主承销商，目标估值区间 $3500 亿–$4000 亿美元，S-1 最快 5 月初公开。

title: Pavel Durov Wants to Give a Billion Telegram Users a Crypto Wallet
summary: The promise of instant, zero-fee crypto transactions for over a billion Telegram users sent its native Gram token up 7%.

title: Tesla spins up robotaxi pilots in Orlando and Tampa ahead of Q2 earnings
summary: The company didn't say how many are in each city and has taken a far more cautious approach to scaling the network than CEO Elon Musk had promised.

title: XRP Breaks Out on Clarity Act Hopes. The Charts Are Still Cautious
summary: The Ripple-linked token just had its best day in weeks, as Washington may finally be delivering what the XRP Army has been waiting for.

title: Robinhood-backed DEX Arcus expands with tokenized assets, perps
summary: Arcus, built by the dYdX team, adds tokenized stocks and perpetual futures on Robinhood Chain as platforms compete to bring traditional assets onchain.

title: Base’s 1:1-backed tokenized equities launch ‘imminent,’ Pollak says
summary: The Coinbase-backed Ethereum layer-2 is preparing to expand its financial offerings as it pivots away from its earlier social-first strategy.
